description_long: This warehouse is a large, rectangular industrial building with a predominantly flat roof featuring several raised sections and skylights. The exterior walls are a mix of white and light gray concrete panels, interspersed with vertical rows of multi-colored window panes on one side. The structure includes multiple large entryways, including a prominent loading dock and a metal roll-up door, as well as smaller access doors. The roof is mostly dark, with visible grid-like skylight panels and some areas of exposed structural framework. The building sits on a broad concrete base, with some overhanging sections and attached utility boxes. The overall appearance is functional and robust, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on practicality.
description: A large, rectangular industrial warehouse with a flat, dark roof, concrete walls, and rows of multi-colored windows. Features include skylights, loading docks, and multiple access doors.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entry area with a large roll-up door, a smaller access door, and a section of the roof with skylights and exposed framework.
description_view_1: The side view shows the long expanse of the building, the flat roof with multiple skylights, and a series of vertical window panels along the wall.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a solid metal wall with a single large door and utility boxes, as well as the concrete base extending outward.
description_view_3: This side view emphasizes the row of multi-colored windows, the flat roof with skylights, and the clean, white facade.
attribute_facade_design: The main facade features a series of vertically aligned, multi-colored window panes set into a white concrete wall, with large industrial doors and minimal decorative detailing. The design emphasizes functionality, with visible utility boxes and a broad concrete base.
attribute_roof_structure: The roof is primarily flat with several raised sections and grid-like skylights, constructed from dark materials and featuring exposed structural elements. There are no visible HVAC units or additional rooftop equipment.
